items.title: Undiagnosed But Something Ain't Right Funny Saying T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: undiagnosed, but, something, ain't, right, saying. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.title: NEW YORK ORANGE & BLUE SKYLINE VINTAGE SILHOUETTE T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: york, orange, blue, skyline, silhouette. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.title: You Can't Scare Me, I Have Kids | Funny Dad Daddy Daughters Children Cute Joke Men T-Shirt
